subcodes.first_line: Glorified art Thou, O Helper of the chosen ones, and glorified art Thou, O Succorer of the pure ones! I beseech Thee by the light of Thy Cause which hath shone forth [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: سبحانک یا معین الاولیاء و سبحانک یا ناصر الاصفیاء اسئلک بنور امرک الذی سطع
subcodes.subjects: @divine grace, bounty, confirmations; spiritual capacity, @prayer for specific individuals; groups, @tests and trials; sacrifice and suffering, @the power of words; of speech, @wisdom [hikmat]
